help: /restore - put the paper back (or just type Y)
/matrix  - digital rain toggle (run again to stop)
Edit public/assets/data/lines-*.json to change these lines.
about: Notebook Homepage Template - a static personal homepage template.
Deploy it to Cloudflare Pages, GitHub Pages, or any static host.
No backend, no database, just HTML/CSS/JS and JSON.
credits: Art - included sample art, replace it for your site
Fonts - Comic Neue / LXGW WenKai GB Screen / JetBrains Mono
poem: Now it is a small doorway
hidden: This is a sample easter egg.
Replace it with your own hints, jokes, or site lore.
protect: OK, I will guard this paper.
sudo: sudo: visitor is not in the sudoers file.
rm: The sample site will not actually delete anything.
cd: There is no real file system here.
whoami: You are a visitor. ID pending.
date: Right now - the moment you see this paper.
uptime: notebook.exe has been running for a little while.
coffee: The cup on the desk has gone cold.
diary_text: Turn it into a site note, character line, project memo,
or remove this easter egg entirely.
color_help: Options: cyan / pink / green / amber / reset

delete: Please do not delete me, I am only a template.
rain: It is raining. Good weather for writing.
cookie: Here is a cookie drawn on paper.
why: Because every site needs an entrance.
how: Read the README, then edit the JSON.

fallback: Hm? Did not get that. Try /help?
Type /help to see what is available.

lines.name: This is a sample character line.
lines.chr: Replace this with your own easter egg.
lines.delete: The template locked this dangerous command.
lines.justDelete: Please do not delete the sample character.
lines.file: This file is only a sample.

chr.label: *.chr
chr.line: Put your hidden easter egg here.

file.label: file table
file.line: The file table is fake, but the atmosphere is real.

greeting: notebook.exe started. Type /help for available commands.
